spec.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
  COALESCE(i.code, 'ID: ' || i.id) || ' (' || COALESCE(last_status.name, 'Без статуса') || ')' AS "Инцидент",
  i.incident_date AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow' AS "Зарегестрирован",
  p.pole AS "Опора",
  COALESCE(b.bs_name, 'Отсутсвтует') AS "Базовая станция",
  COALESCE(it.name, 'Отсутсвтует') AS "Тип инцидента",
  COALESCE(ist.name, 'Отсутсвтует') AS "Подтип инцидента",
  CASE 
      WHEN (it.sla_deadline IS NULL or i.avr_start_date IS NULL) THEN 'Отсутсвтует'
      ELSE to_char(
          (i.avr_start_date + (it.sla_deadline || ' minutes')::interval) AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow', 
          'DD.MM.YYYY HH24:MI:SS'
      )
  END AS "Дедлайн АВР",
  CASE
    -- Без SLA
    WHEN (it.sla_deadline IS NULL OR i.avr_start_date IS NULL) THEN 'no_sla'
    -- Если инцидент уже закрыт
    WHEN i.avr_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN CASE
      WHEN i.avr_end_date > (
        i.avr_start_date + (it.sla_deadline || ' minutes') :: interval
      ) THEN 'expired' -- Просрочен (можно назвать 'closed_late')
      ELSE 'closed_ok' -- Закрыто вовремя
    END -- Если инцидент еще открыт
    ELSE CASE
      -- Прошло больше времени, чем отведено по SLA -> Просрочен
      WHEN EXTRACT(
        EPOCH
        FROM
          (
            (
              i.avr_start_date + (it.sla_deadline || ' minutes') :: interval
            ) - NOW()
          )
      ) < 0 THEN 'expired' -- Осталось меньше часа до дедлайна -> В ожидании (Warning)
      WHEN EXTRACT(
        EPOCH
        FROM
          (
            (
              i.avr_start_date + (it.sla_deadline || ' minutes') :: interval
            ) - NOW()
          )
      ) <= 3600 THEN 'warning' -- Все хорошо -> В работе
      ELSE 'in_progress'
    END
  END as "SLA АВР",
  COALESCE(p.address, 'Без адреса') AS "Адрес",
  p.pole_latitude AS latitude,
  p.pole_longtitude AS longitude
FROM
  incidents_incident AS i
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (sh.incident_id) 
      sh.incident_id,
      s.name
    FROM incidents_incidentstatushistory sh
    JOIN incidents_incidentstatus s ON sh.status_id = s.id
    ORDER BY sh.incident_id, sh.insert_date DESC, sh.id DESC
  ) AS last_status ON i.id = last_status.incident_id
  LEFT JOIN incidents_incidenttype AS it ON i.incident_type_id = it.id
  LEFT JOIN incidents_incidentsubtype AS ist ON i.incident_subtype_id = it.id
  LEFT JOIN incidents_incidentcategoryrelation AS icr ON i.id = icr.incident_id
  LEFT JOIN incidents_incidentcategory AS ic ON icr.category_id = ic.id
  LEFT JOIN ts_pole AS p ON i.pole_id = p.id
  LEFT JOIN ts_region AS r ON p.region_id = r.id
  LEFT JOIN ts_macroregion AS m ON r.macroregion_id = m.id
  LEFT JOIN ts_basestation AS b ON i.base_station_id = b.id
  LEFT JOIN ts_basestation_operator AS bs_op ON b.id = bs_op.basestation_id
  LEFT JOIN ts_basestationoperator AS op ON bs_op.basestationoperator_id = op.id
WHERE
  ic.name = 'АВР' AND ic.id IN ($categories)
  AND is_incident_finish = False
  AND p.pole_latitude IS NOT NULL
  AND p.pole_longtitude IS NOT NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(i.incident_date)
  AND ($macroregion = 0 OR m.id IN ($macroregion))
  AND ($avr_contractor = 0 OR p.avr_contractor_id IN ($avr_contractor))
  AND ('${region_manager}' = '0' OR r.responsible_manager = '${region_manager}')
  AND ('${operator_group}' = '0' OR op.operator_group = '${operator_group}')
  AND (
    '${duration_range}' = '0'     
    OR ('${duration_range}' = '0-5' AND 
        CASE 
          WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)) / 60
          ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.incident_date)) / 60
        END BETWEEN 0 AND 5
    )
    
    OR ('${duration_range}' = '5-15' AND 
        CASE 
          WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)) / 60
          ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.incident_date)) / 60
        END BETWEEN 6 AND 15
    )
    
    OR ('${duration_range}' = '15-30' AND 
        CASE 
          WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)) / 60
          ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.incident_date)) / 60
        END BETWEEN 16 AND 30
    )
    
    OR ('${duration_range}' = '30-60' AND 
        CASE 
          WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)) / 60
          ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.incident_date)) / 60
        END BETWEEN 31 AND 60
    )
    
    OR ('${duration_range}' = '>60' AND 
        CASE 
          WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)) / 60
          ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.incident_date)) / 60
        END > 60
    )
  )

SELECT DISTINCT
  COALESCE(i.code, 'ID: ' || i.id) || ' (' || COALESCE(last_status.name, 'Без статуса') || ')' AS "Инцидент",
  i.incident_date AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow' AS "Зарегестрирован",
  p.pole AS "Опора",
  COALESCE(b.bs_name, 'Отсутствует') AS "Базовая станция",
  -- Для РВР тип может быть общим, но оставим для информации
  COALESCE(it.name, 'Не указан') AS "Тип инцидента", 
  COALESCE(ist.name, 'Не указан') AS "Подтип инцидента",
  
  -- Расчет дедлайна (фиксированный +72 часа от старта РВР)
  CASE 
      WHEN i.rvr_start_date IS NULL THEN 'Отсутсвтует'
      ELSE to_char(
          (i.rvr_start_date + INTERVAL '4320 minutes') AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow', 
          'DD.MM.YYYY HH24:MI:SS'
      )
  END AS "Дедлайн РВР",

  -- Логика SLA для РВР (Фиксированная 72 часа)
  CASE
    -- Если инцидент закрыт
    WHEN i.rvr_start_date IS NULL THEN 'no_sla'
    WHEN i.rvr_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN 
      CASE 
        WHEN i.rvr_end_date > (i.rvr_start_date + INTERVAL '4320 minutes') THEN 'expired' -- Просрочен
        ELSE 'closed_ok' -- Закрыто вовремя
      END
    -- Если инцидент открыт
    ELSE 
      CASE 
        -- Проверка на просрочку (текущее время > начало + 72ч)
        WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((i.rvr_start_date + INTERVAL '4320 minutes') - NOW())) < 0 THEN 'expired'
        -- Менее часа до конца (осталось <= 1 час)
        WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((i.rvr_start_date + INTERVAL '4320 minutes') - NOW())) <= 3600 THEN 'warning'
        -- Все хорошо -> В работе
        ELSE 'in_progress'
      END
  END AS "SLA РВР",

  COALESCE(p.address, 'Без адреса') AS "Адрес",
  p.pole_latitude AS latitude,
  p.pole_longtitude AS longitude

FROM
  incidents_incident AS i
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (sh.incident_id) 
      sh.incident_id,
      s.name
    FROM incidents_incidentstatushistory sh
    JOIN incidents_incidentstatus s ON sh.status_id = s.id
    ORDER BY sh.incident_id, sh.insert_date DESC, sh.id DESC
  ) AS last_status ON i.id = last_status.incident_id
  LEFT JOIN incidents_incidenttype AS it ON i.incident_type_id = it.id
  LEFT JOIN incidents_incidentsubtype AS ist ON i.incident_subtype_id = it.id
  LEFT JOIN incidents_incidentcategoryrelation AS icr ON i.id = icr.incident_id
  LEFT JOIN incidents_incidentcategory AS ic ON icr.category_id = ic.id
  LEFT JOIN ts_pole AS p ON i.pole_id = p.id
  LEFT JOIN ts_region AS r ON p.region_id = r.id
  LEFT JOIN ts_macroregion AS m ON r.macroregion_id = m.id
  LEFT JOIN ts_basestation AS b ON i.base_station_id = b.id
  LEFT JOIN ts_basestation_operator AS bs_op ON b.id = bs_op.basestation_id
  LEFT JOIN ts_basestationoperator AS op ON bs_op.basestationoperator_id = op.id

WHERE
  ic.name = 'РВР' AND ic.id IN ($categories)
  AND i.is_incident_finish = False 
  AND p.pole_latitude IS NOT NULL
  AND p.pole_longtitude IS NOT NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(i.incident_date)
  AND ($macroregion = 0 OR m.id IN ($macroregion))
  AND ($avr_contractor = 0 OR p.avr_contractor_id IN ($avr_contractor))
  AND ('${region_manager}' = '0' OR r.responsible_manager = '${region_manager}')
  AND ('${operator_group}' = '0' OR op.operator_group = '${operator_group}')
  AND (
    '${duration_range}' = '0'     
    OR ('${duration_range}' = '0-5' AND 
        CASE 
          WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)) / 60
          ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.incident_date)) / 60
        END BETWEEN 0 AND 5
    )
    
    OR ('${duration_range}' = '5-15' AND 
        CASE 
          WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)) / 60
          ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.incident_date)) / 60
        END BETWEEN 6 AND 15
    )
    
    OR ('${duration_range}' = '15-30' AND 
        CASE 
          WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)) / 60
          ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.incident_date)) / 60
        END BETWEEN 16 AND 30
    )
    
    OR ('${duration_range}' = '30-60' AND 
        CASE 
          WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)) / 60
          ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.incident_date)) / 60
        END BETWEEN 31 AND 60
    )
    
    OR ('${duration_range}' = '>60' AND 
        CASE 
          WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)) / 60
          ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.incident_date)) / 60
        END > 60
    )
  )

SELECT DISTINCT
  COALESCE(i.code, 'ID: ' || i.id) || ' (' || COALESCE(last_status.name, 'Без статуса') || ')' AS "Инцидент",
  i.incident_date AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow' AS "Зарегестрирован",
  p.pole AS "Опора",
  COALESCE(b.bs_name, 'Отсутствует') AS "Базовая станция",
  COALESCE(it.name, 'Не указан') AS "Тип инцидента", 
  COALESCE(ist.name, 'Не указан') AS "Подтип инцидента",
  
  -- Расчет времени начала ДГУ (для информации)
  CASE 
      WHEN i.dgu_start_date IS NULL THEN 'Отсутствует'
      ELSE to_char(i.dgu_start_date AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow', 'DD.MM.YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
  END AS "Начало ДГУ",
  
  -- Расчет времени окончания ДГУ (если есть)
  CASE 
      WHEN i.dgu_end_date IS NULL THEN 'Отсутствует'
      ELSE to_char(i.dgu_end_date AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow', 'DD.MM.YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
  END AS "Конец ДГУ",

  -- Логика SLA для ДГУ (15 дней / 12 часов)
  CASE
    -- Если инцидент закрыт
    WHEN i.dgu_start_date IS NULL THEN 'no_sla'
    WHEN i.dgu_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN 
      CASE 
        -- Если закрыто, но прошло больше 15 дней с начала
        WHEN i.dgu_end_date > (i.dgu_start_date + INTERVAL '15 days') THEN 'ghe_15_days'
        ELSE 'closed_on_15_days'
      END
    -- Если инцидент открыт
    ELSE 
      CASE 
        -- 1. Прошло больше 15 дней (15 * 24 * 3600 = 1296000 секунд)
        WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.dgu_start_date)) > 1296000 THEN 'ghe_15_days'
        
        -- 2. Прошло меньше 12 часов с момента старта (12 * 3600 = 43200 секунд)
        WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.dgu_start_date)) <= 43200 THEN 'lte_12_hour'
        
        -- 3. Прошло больше 12 часов, но меньше 15 дней
        ELSE 'lte_15_days'
      END
  END AS "SLA ДГУ",

  COALESCE(p.address, 'Без адреса') AS "Адрес",
  p.pole_latitude AS latitude,
  p.pole_longtitude AS longitude

FROM
  incidents_incident AS i
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (sh.incident_id) 
      sh.incident_id,
      s.name
    FROM incidents_incidentstatushistory sh
    JOIN incidents_incidentstatus s ON sh.status_id = s.id
    ORDER BY sh.incident_id, sh.insert_date DESC, sh.id DESC
  ) AS last_status ON i.id = last_status.incident_id
  LEFT JOIN incidents_incidenttype AS it ON i.incident_type_id = it.id
  LEFT JOIN incidents_incidentsubtype AS ist ON i.incident_subtype_id = it.id
  LEFT JOIN incidents_incidentcategoryrelation AS icr ON i.id = icr.incident_id
  LEFT JOIN incidents_incidentcategory AS ic ON icr.category_id = ic.id
  LEFT JOIN ts_pole AS p ON i.pole_id = p.id
  LEFT JOIN ts_region AS r ON p.region_id = r.id
  LEFT JOIN ts_macroregion AS m ON r.macroregion_id = m.id
  LEFT JOIN ts_basestation AS b ON i.base_station_id = b.id
  LEFT JOIN ts_basestation_operator AS bs_op ON b.id = bs_op.basestation_id
  LEFT JOIN ts_basestationoperator AS op ON bs_op.basestationoperator_id = op.id

WHERE
  -- Фильтр по имени категории и ID из переменной
  ic.name = 'ДГУ' AND ic.id IN ($categories)
  
  -- Только незакрытые (или можно убрать это условие, если нужно видеть и закрытые для истории)
  AND i.is_incident_finish = False 
  
  -- Координаты
  AND p.pole_latitude IS NOT NULL
  AND p.pole_longtitude IS NOT NULL
  
  -- Время и другие фильтры
  AND $__timeFilter(i.incident_date)
  AND ($macroregion = 0 OR m.id IN ($macroregion))
  AND ($avr_contractor = 0 OR p.avr_contractor_id IN ($avr_contractor))
  AND ('${region_manager}' = '0' OR r.responsible_manager = '${region_manager}')
  AND ('${operator_group}' = '0' OR op.operator_group = '${operator_group}')
  AND (
    '${duration_range}' = '0'     
    OR ('${duration_range}' = '0-5' AND 
        CASE 
          WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)) / 60
          ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.incident_date)) / 60
        END BETWEEN 0 AND 5
    )
    
    OR ('${duration_range}' = '5-15' AND 
        CASE 
          WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)) / 60
          ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.incident_date)) / 60
        END BETWEEN 6 AND 15
    )
    
    OR ('${duration_range}' = '15-30' AND 
        CASE 
          WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)) / 60
          ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.incident_date)) / 60
        END BETWEEN 16 AND 30
    )
    
    OR ('${duration_range}' = '30-60' AND 
        CASE 
          WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)) / 60
          ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.incident_date)) / 60
        END BETWEEN 31 AND 60
    )
    
    OR ('${duration_range}' = '>60' AND 
        CASE 
          WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)) / 60
          ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.incident_date)) / 60
        END > 60
    )
  )

SELECT DISTINCT
  COALESCE(i.code, 'ID: ' || i.id) || ' (' || COALESCE(last_status.name, 'Без статуса') || ')' AS "Инцидент",
  i.incident_date AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow' AS "Зарегестрирован",
  p.pole AS "Опора",
  COALESCE(b.bs_name, 'Отсутствует') AS "Базовая станция",
  COALESCE(it.name, 'Не указан') AS "Тип инцидента", 
  COALESCE(ist.name, 'Не указан') AS "Подтип инцидента",
  
  -- Расчет времени начала ЭКС (для информации)
  CASE 
      WHEN i.eks_start_date IS NULL THEN 'Отсутствует'
      ELSE to_char(i.eks_start_date AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow', 'DD.MM.YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
  END AS "Начало ЭКС",
  
  -- Расчет времени окончания ЭКС (если есть)
  CASE 
      WHEN i.eks_end_date IS NULL THEN 'Отсутствует'
      ELSE to_char(i.eks_end_date AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow', 'DD.MM.YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
  END AS "Конец ЭКС",

  -- Логика SLA для ЭКС (15 дней / 12 часов)
  CASE
    WHEN i.eks_start_date IS NULL THEN 'no_sla'
    
    -- Если инцидент закрыт
    WHEN i.eks_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN 
      CASE 
        -- Если закрыто, но прошло больше 15 дней с начала
        WHEN i.eks_end_date > (i.eks_start_date + INTERVAL '15 days') THEN 'ghe_15_days'
        ELSE 'closed_on_15_days'
      END
    
    -- Если инцидент открыт
    ELSE 
      CASE 
        -- 1. Прошло больше 15 дней (15 * 24 * 3600 = 1296000 секунд)
        WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.eks_start_date)) > 1296000 THEN 'ghe_15_days'
        
        -- 2. Прошло меньше 12 часов с момента старта (12 * 3600 = 43200 секунд)
        WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.eks_start_date)) <= 43200 THEN 'lte_12_hour'
        
        -- 3. Прошло больше 12 часов, но меньше 15 дней
        ELSE 'lte_15_days'
      END
  END AS "SLA ЭКС",

  COALESCE(p.address, 'Без адреса') AS "Адрес",
  p.pole_latitude AS latitude,
  p.pole_longtitude AS longitude

FROM
  incidents_incident AS i
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (sh.incident_id) 
      sh.incident_id,
      s.name
    FROM incidents_incidentstatushistory sh
    JOIN incidents_incidentstatus s ON sh.status_id = s.id
    ORDER BY sh.incident_id, sh.insert_date DESC, sh.id DESC
  ) AS last_status ON i.id = last_status.incident_id
  LEFT JOIN incidents_incidenttype AS it ON i.incident_type_id = it.id
  LEFT JOIN incidents_incidentsubtype AS ist ON i.incident_subtype_id = it.id
  LEFT JOIN incidents_incidentcategoryrelation AS icr ON i.id = icr.incident_id
  LEFT JOIN incidents_incidentcategory AS ic ON icr.category_id = ic.id
  LEFT JOIN ts_pole AS p ON i.pole_id = p.id
  LEFT JOIN ts_region AS r ON p.region_id = r.id
  LEFT JOIN ts_macroregion AS m ON r.macroregion_id = m.id
  LEFT JOIN ts_basestation AS b ON i.base_station_id = b.id
  LEFT JOIN ts_basestation_operator AS bs_op ON b.id = bs_op.basestation_id
  LEFT JOIN ts_basestationoperator AS op ON bs_op.basestationoperator_id = op.id

WHERE
  -- Фильтр по имени категории и ID из переменной
  ic.name = 'ЭКС' AND ic.id IN ($categories)
  
  -- Только незакрытые (можно убрать, если нужно видеть историю)
  AND i.is_incident_finish = False 
  
  -- Координаты
  AND p.pole_latitude IS NOT NULL
  AND p.pole_longtitude IS NOT NULL
  
  -- Время и другие фильтры
  AND $__timeFilter(i.incident_date)
  AND ($macroregion = 0 OR m.id IN ($macroregion))
  AND ($avr_contractor = 0 OR p.avr_contractor_id IN ($avr_contractor))
  AND ('${region_manager}' = '0' OR r.responsible_manager = '${region_manager}')
  AND ('${operator_group}' = '0' OR op.operator_group = '${operator_group}')
  AND (
    '${duration_range}' = '0'     
    OR ('${duration_range}' = '0-5' AND 
        CASE 
          WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)) / 60
          ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.incident_date)) / 60
        END BETWEEN 0 AND 5
    )
    
    OR ('${duration_range}' = '5-15' AND 
        CASE 
          WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)) / 60
          ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.incident_date)) / 60
        END BETWEEN 6 AND 15
    )
    
    OR ('${duration_range}' = '15-30' AND 
        CASE 
          WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)) / 60
          ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.incident_date)) / 60
        END BETWEEN 16 AND 30
    )
    
    OR ('${duration_range}' = '30-60' AND 
        CASE 
          WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)) / 60
          ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.incident_date)) / 60
        END BETWEEN 31 AND 60
    )
    
    OR ('${duration_range}' = '>60' AND 
        CASE 
          WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)) / 60
          ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.incident_date)) / 60
        END > 60
    )
  )

SELECT 
  p.pole AS "Опора",
  COALESCE(b.bs_name, 'Отсутствует') AS "Базовая станция",
  STRING_AGG(COALESCE(i.code, 'ID: ' || i.id), ', ') AS "Инциденты",
  COUNT(i.id) AS "Повторы"
FROM incidents_incident AS i
JOIN ts_pole AS p ON i.pole_id = p.id
LEFT JOIN ts_basestation AS b ON i.base_station_id = b.id
LEFT JOIN incidents_incidentcategoryrelation AS icr ON i.id = icr.incident_id
LEFT JOIN incidents_incidentcategory AS ic ON icr.category_id = ic.id
LEFT JOIN ts_region AS r ON p.region_id = r.id
LEFT JOIN ts_macroregion AS m ON r.macroregion_id = m.id
LEFT JOIN ts_basestation_operator AS bs_op ON b.id = bs_op.basestation_id
LEFT JOIN ts_basestationoperator AS op ON bs_op.basestationoperator_id = op.id
WHERE 
  -- Фильтр категории
  ic.id IN ($categories) 
  
  -- Только открытые инциденты
  AND i.is_incident_finish = False 
  
  -- Координаты (обязательно для карты)
  AND p.pole IS NOT NULL
  
  AND $__timeFilter(i.incident_date)
  AND ($macroregion = 0 OR m.id IN ($macroregion))
  AND ($avr_contractor = 0 OR p.avr_contractor_id IN ($avr_contractor))
  AND ('${region_manager}' = '0' OR r.responsible_manager = '${region_manager}')
  AND ('${operator_group}' = '0' OR op.operator_group = '${operator_group}')
  AND (
    '${duration_range}' = '0'     
    OR ('${duration_range}' = '0-5' AND 
        CASE 
          WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)) / 60
          ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.incident_date)) / 60
        END BETWEEN 0 AND 5
    )
    
    OR ('${duration_range}' = '5-15' AND 
        CASE 
          WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)) / 60
          ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.incident_date)) / 60
        END BETWEEN 6 AND 15
    )
    
    OR ('${duration_range}' = '15-30' AND 
        CASE 
          WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)) / 60
          ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.incident_date)) / 60
        END BETWEEN 16 AND 30
    )
    
    OR ('${duration_range}' = '30-60' AND 
        CASE 
          WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)) / 60
          ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.incident_date)) / 60
        END BETWEEN 31 AND 60
    )
    
    OR ('${duration_range}' = '>60' AND 
        CASE 
          WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)) / 60
          ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.incident_date)) / 60
        END > 60
    )
  )

GROUP BY 
  p.pole, 
  b.bs_name

HAVING 
  COUNT(i.id) >= 2 

ORDER BY 
  p.pole,
  b.bs_name,
  COUNT(i.id) DESC, 
  MAX(i.incident_date) DESC;

spec.name: duration_range
spec.label: Длительности инцидента (мин.)
spec.description: Длительность инцидента от даты регистрации, до даты закрытия или текущей даты.

spec.name: operator_group
spec.label: Оператор

spec.query:
SELECT DISTINCT
operator_group
FROM ts_basestationoperator
WHERE operator_group != ''
ORDER BY operator_group
spec.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
operator_group
FROM ts_basestationoperator
WHERE operator_group != ''
ORDER BY operator_group

spec.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT
operator_group
FROM ts_basestationoperator
WHERE operator_group != ''
ORDER BY operator_group

spec.name: macroregion
spec.label: МР

spec.query:
SELECT
	name AS "Macroregion Name",
	id AS "Macroregion ID"
FROM ts_macroregion
ORDER BY name, id;
spec.rawSql:
SELECT
	name AS "Macroregion Name",
	id AS "Macroregion ID"
FROM ts_macroregion
ORDER BY name, id;

spec.definition:
SELECT
	name AS "Macroregion Name",
	id AS "Macroregion ID"
FROM ts_macroregion
ORDER BY name, id;

spec.name: region_manager
spec.label: Энергетик

spec.query:
SELECT DISTINCT
	responsible_manager 
FROM ts_region
WHERE responsible_manager IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY responsible_manager
spec.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
	responsible_manager 
FROM ts_region
WHERE responsible_manager IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY responsible_manager

spec.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT
	responsible_manager 
FROM ts_region
WHERE responsible_manager IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY responsible_manager

spec.name: avr_contractor
spec.label: Подрядчик

spec.query:
SELECT
	contractor_name AS "Contractor Name",
	id AS "Contractor ID"
FROM ts_avrcontractor
WHERE contractor_name != 'undefined'
ORDER BY contractor_name, id;
spec.rawSql:
SELECT
	contractor_name AS "Contractor Name",
	id AS "Contractor ID"
FROM ts_avrcontractor
WHERE contractor_name != 'undefined'
ORDER BY contractor_name, id;

spec.definition:
SELECT
	contractor_name AS "Contractor Name",
	id AS "Contractor ID"
FROM ts_avrcontractor
WHERE contractor_name != 'undefined'
ORDER BY contractor_name, id;
